patterns.label: Azure DevOps Work-Item Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 30 more ADO notifications (Tasks, Requirements, Bugs, Epics) perfectly matching prior cycle volume. Machine-parseable subjects. Auto bumped 92→93 — two-cycle perfect consistency. RISING driven by cumulative volume (90 occ total). PM subscriber not assignee in most cases.

patterns.label: Meeting-to-Loop Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Chain head pattern: Meeting → Loop Notes → Decisions/Actions → Follow-up. Cycle 38 confirms freq 4 meetings + freq 4 documents again. Stable Loop template: Agenda / Notes / Decisions / Open questions / Follow-up. Highest composite score. Structural — confirmed across 38 cycles.

patterns.label: Inbound Eval Strategy Guidance & Tooling Q&A
patterns.llmRationale: BSI CRITICAL. Cycle 38: 10 eval strategy pings + 5 CLI/tooling troubleshooting = 15 new requests. Auto bumped 68→70 as Q&A patterns become more structured. Rising demand amplified by Camp AIR (900 min immersion event) and EvalCon deadline pressure. PM sole DRI, zero delegation observed.

patterns.label: Eval Strategy & Cross-Org Reporting
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: CAPE/Evals Leadership (freq 3) + Project Crucible deepdive (freq 1) + EvalCon planning (freq 4) + Golden Evals bi-weekly (freq 1). Auto bumped 84→85 as cross-org synthesis pattern solidifies. EvalCon deadline amplifying. Highest value score (95). ParticipantCount grew from 5→6.

patterns.label: Weekly Status Update Assembly (Multi-Format Duplication)
patterns.llmRationale: Weekly status in done/next/blockers PLUS bi-weekly newsletter PLUS Cape Day slides. SGI 80+: same progress restated in 3+ artifacts. Stable structural pattern confirmed in cycle 38.

patterns.label: External Partner & Customer Eval Session Facilitation
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 6 sessions across 50+ external domains (Accenture, HCLTech, EY, KPMG, Avanade, Cognizant). 13 hrs this cycle, 39 hrs total. Rebuild-per-engagement pattern persists. RISING — volume and domain diversity both increasing.

patterns.label: Parallel Eval Enablement Deck Creation (SGI Gap)
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 3 more parallel deck versions (PM, Program Manager, Field Engineer). EvalCon deadline amplifying urgency. Meetings explicitly flag 'multiple versions floating'. SGI 90+. RISING: deck creation gap widening as EvalCon approaches.

patterns.label: Recurring Weekly Team Sync Operating Rhythm
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38 confirms 4 recurring meetings: Evals Sync (Tue 3:05), Project Crucible v-Team (Mon 8:05), Manager Team Meeting (Mon 11:05), Solution Library Check-In (Mon 9:05). Plus 6 weekly 1:1s. All extended through August. ParticipantCount expanded to 7.

patterns.label: Security & Compliance Alert Classification
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 7 alerts from Office365/Purview (File Blocked, Admin elevation, Loop workspace). Machine-parseable. Deterministic classify-route-acknowledge. Perfectly stable pattern — 7/cycle across all observed cycles.

patterns.label: Cross-Org Navigation & VOC Routing Assistance
patterns.llmRationale: PM informal router between Field Engineers, MCS Analytics, PG eval teams. 4 pings/cycle asking 'who owns this'. Automatable as DRI directory + routing skill. Consistent 4/cycle intake across all observed cycles.

patterns.label: Technical Artifact Distribution via Teams
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 8 Teams artifact shares (GitHub repos, ZIPs, YAML) + 5 skill-detector spec iterations = 13 new. PM uses Teams as distribution hub. Builder-User Prototyping archetype. Stable.

patterns.label: Daily Personal Day-Prep Planning Page
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 5 daily planning artifacts. Structured '[Mar 19] Help me prepare for my day' pattern confirmed. Automatable: pull calendar, pending items, open emails. Trend normalized rising→stable after consistent same-volume evidence across multiple cycles.

patterns.label: Immersive Training Event Cascade (Camp AIR)
patterns.llmRationale: Camp AIR confirmed in cycle 38: 2 full-day events (900 min), 70-80% of weekly meeting time. CASCADE SOURCE amplifying 4+ downstream patterns (eval coaching surge, deck creation, artifact distribution). Normalized rising→stable — quarterly cadence consistent.

patterns.label: Agent Architecture & MCP/Skills Scoping Discussions
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 5 Teams discussions on MCP servers, CLI vs UI tradeoffs, WorkIQ integration, skill-creator/detector/PRD-generator architecture, SDK capabilities, Copilot Studio. Richest technical thread in dataset. RISING as agent ecosystem complexity grows.

patterns.label: Skill-Detector Technical Spec Iterative Build Cycle
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 5 more skill-detector spec iterations (ZIP packages with SKILL.md, scripts, config). Recurring spec-build-test-ship loop confirmed. Builder-User Prototyping archetype. RISING as Skilluminator matures.

patterns.label: Agent Eval Sets Template Maintenance (Living Excel)
patterns.llmRationale: Agent_Eval_Sets_Template.xlsx shared in cycle 38. Living template/tracker reused as eval needs evolve (Nov 2025 to present). Template Scaffolding archetype. Version management automatable.

patterns.label: Viva Engage & Community Digest Passive Consumption
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 5 digest emails (Daily/Weekly Digest, Copilot Tasks, SharePoint AI tips). Passive consumption. Low value but high automation ceiling. Anti-pattern risk: Community Digest Overreach if surfacing too much.

patterns.label: High-Urgency Escalation Email Authoring
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: 1 URGENT escalation email (degree verification to external university). High-stakes, direct style. Low automation ceiling — requires judgment and human review mandatory. Draft assist possible but risky.

patterns.label: Urgent Technical Feasibility Coordination Threads
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 38: URGENT Declarative Agent grounded in 170+ SharePoint sites. Architecture risk coordination with senior stakeholders. Low automation (judgment-heavy) but recurring pattern of iterative clarification threads.

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Answers eval strategy and tooling questions using a knowledge base of eval best practices, metric selection guides, and CLI troubleshooting. Eliminates BSI-critical bottleneck where PM fields 15+ requests/week. Cycle 38: demand rising with Camp AIR + EvalCon prep.
triggerExamples: How many eval cases are enough?
When should evals happen in agent lifecycle?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 15+ pings/week freed from single DRI. Scales eval expertise to 50+ partner domains. BSI CRITICAL reduction target.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Auto-drafts Loop meeting notes with Agenda/Decisions/Actions/Open Questions from transcript or summary. Chain head that unblocks downstream status and follow-up patterns. Confirmed across 38 cycles.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from Crucible meeting
Create Loop doc from this transcript
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Chain head. 24 occ total. Unblocks status reports, follow-up workflows, transcript patterns.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Synthesizes eval results, strategy threads, and cross-org reporting into leadership-ready summaries. EvalCon content planning and Project Crucible deepdive summaries. Cycle 38: rising with EvalCon deadline amplifier.
triggerExamples: Summarize this week's eval results for leadership
Draft EvalCon submission from these threads
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Highest value score (95). Rising trend. EvalCon deadline amplifier active.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notifications by work-item type (Task/Bug/Requirement/Epic) and routes to action-required/watch/suppress buckets based on PM role. Cycle 38: 30 new notifications, 90 total across observed cycles.
triggerExamples: Which work items need my attention?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 90 total occurrences. Auto score 93. Near-full automation potential. RISING.

candidateSkills.name: partner-eval-enablement-pack-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates pre-session enablement packages for external partner eval meetings. Domain-specific eval templates, agenda, and prep materials based on partner type. 39 hrs total across observed cycles.
triggerExamples: Eval brief for new SI partner
candidateSkills.valueProposition: 39 hrs total across 50+ domains. Eliminates per-engagement rebuild cycle.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Assembles weekly status from M365 artifacts into done/next/blockers format, then reformats for all required output formats (status update, newsletter, Cape Day slides).
candidateSkills.valueProposition: SGI 80+. Single source to 3+ output formats. Eliminates parallel restatement effort.

candidateSkills.name: eval-deck-consolidation-assistant
candidateSkills.description: Detects and merges parallel eval enablement deck versions into a single canonical deck. Tracks divergence and flags conflicts. Cycle 38: rising urgency with EvalCon deadline.
candidateSkills.valueProposition: SGI 90+. 9 occ. Rising with EvalCon prep. Eliminates 3-way parallel creation.
